cards.title: Lovable Expands Google Cloud Partnership 5x
cards.body: Lovable signed a multiyear deal with Google Cloud to expand its footprint fivefold with increased access to Anthropic Claude. The partnership signals growing enterprise adoption of AI development platforms.

cards.title: Alphabet Raises Record $85B for AI Business
cards.body: Alphabet completed a record-breaking $85 billion stock sale dedicated to Google's AI operations. The massive raise signals strong investor confidence in AI-driven business models.

cards.title: Google Launches Dreambeans AI Cartoon Tool
cards.body: Google's new Dreambeans curates AI-illustrated stories directly from your personal Google account data. The tool transforms personal information into animated content automatically.

cards.title: Amazon Deploys AI-Generated Product Images
cards.body: Amazon will display AI-generated product images matching search queries using visual search technology. The company claims the feature helps guide users to relevant products.

cards.title: Voice AI Startup Handles 17,000 Calls Daily
cards.body: Ex-Goldman and Meta founders built voice AI infrastructure for African and Middle Eastern markets. Their platform now processes over 17,000 calls daily across underserved regions.

cards.title: Publishers Get AI Search Opt-Out Tool
cards.body: U.K. regulators require Google to offer publishers a tool to opt out of generative AI search features. The feature will launch in the U.K. before rolling out globally.

cards.title: Meta's WhatsApp AI Agent Goes Global
cards.body: Meta's AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available worldwide with token-based pricing. Businesses will be charged based on token consumption for agent interactions.

cards.title: Coralogix Raises $200M for AI Monitoring
cards.body: Coralogix secured $200 million to build infrastructure for monitoring and troubleshooting AI agents in production. The infrastructure startup is positioned to capitalize on enterprise AI deployment growth.

cards.title: Cyera Valued at $12B Despite Losses
cards.body: The cybersecurity company is closing a $300 million round led by Evolution Equity Partners at an $12 billion valuation. Cyera commands an 80x ARR multiple despite operating losses.

cards.title: Uber Caps AI Spending After 4 Months
cards.body: Uber implemented spending caps on employee AI tool usage after exhausting its budget in just four months. The company had previously encouraged unlimited AI adoption across staff.

cards.title: Microsoft Releases AI Evaluation Framework
cards.body: Microsoft unveiled ASSERT, an open-source framework enabling developers to test AI behavior using simple text descriptions. The tool streamlines creation of AI evaluations and regression testing.

cards.title: Scorsese Uses AI for Storyboarding Only
cards.body: Martin Scorsese has become Hollywood's latest voice endorsing AI technology, though exclusively for storyboarding purposes. The legendary director remains cautious about broader AI applications in filmmaking.

cards.title: Microsoft Launches Scout Personal Assistant
cards.body: Microsoft introduced Scout at Build, an OpenClaw-inspired AI assistant integrated into Microsoft 365. The tool brings advanced personal assistance capabilities directly into enterprise workflows.

cards.title: Google Adds Fake Call Detection Protection
cards.body: Google deployed fake call detection to combat AI deepfake impersonation scams spoofing trusted numbers. The feature protects users as scammers increasingly use AI voice cloning.

cards.title: Microsoft Lets Devs Control Agent Behavior
cards.body: Microsoft released policy specification tools allowing developers to define AI agent behavior in portable files. The solution gives compliance and security teams granular control over agent actions.

cards.title: Amazon Faces Facial Recognition Lawsuit
cards.body: Ring users filed a class action lawsuit claiming the Familiar Faces feature stores passerby images without consent. The Seattle lawsuit challenges Amazon's facial recognition practices across Ring devices.

cards.title: Trump Signs Narrower AI Oversight Order
cards.body: President Trump signed a revised AI executive order requiring only voluntary government reviews of advanced models. The narrower approach reflects industry objections to stricter AI regulations.

cards.title: OpenAI Launches Codex Industry Plugins
cards.body: OpenAI released six specialized Codex plugins for data analytics, creative work, sales, design, investing, and banking. Each plugin bundles integrations and context for domain-specific white-collar work.

cards.title: Anthropic Expands Claude Security Initiative
cards.body: Anthropic scaled its Project Glasswing program, expanding Claude Mythos access to 150 organizations across 15 countries. The initiative focuses on critical infrastructure protection in power, water, healthcare, and communications.

cards.title: ZeroDrift Raises $10M for AI Compliance
cards.body: ZeroDrift secured $10 million to build AI compliance services that monitor and filter model outputs. The middleware solution sits between AI systems and users to flag compliance risks.

cards.title: Lovable expands Google Cloud partnership 5x
cards.body: Lovable signed a multiyear deal with Google Cloud to expand its footprint significantly. The agreement includes expanded access to Anthropic's Claude AI model.

cards.title: Alphabet raises record $85B for AI business
cards.body: Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals strong investor appetite for AI offerings. The move demonstrates market confidence in AI-related expansion.

cards.title: Google Dreambeans turns personal data into cartoons
cards.body: Google's new Dreambeans tool transforms personal data into AI-illustrated stories. The feature curates content from your Google account for creative visualization.

cards.title: Amazon uses AI to generate product search images
cards.body: Amazon will deploy visual search and AI to show generated product images matching queries. The retailer claims it helps guide users to relevant products.

cards.title: Startup brings voice AI to underserved markets
cards.body: Two former Goldman and Meta founders built AI voice technology for Africa and Middle East. Their stack now handles over 17,000 calls daily.

cards.title: UK regulators let publishers opt out of AI Search
cards.body: U.K. regulators require Google offer publishers a tool to opt-out of generative AI search. The option will be tested in the U.K. then rolled globally.

cards.title: Meta's WhatsApp AI agent launches worldwide
cards.body: Meta's AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available globally. Businesses pay based on token usage for agent functionality.

cards.title: Coralogix raises $200M to monitor AI agents
cards.body: Coralogix raised $200M betting on infrastructure for monitoring AI systems in production. The platform helps troubleshoot failures and track operational behavior.

cards.title: Uber limits employee AI spending after overages
cards.body: Uber capped employee AI spending after staff blew through budget in 4 months. The company had previously encouraged unlimited AI tool usage.

cards.title: Microsoft releases open-source AI evaluation framework
cards.body: Microsoft launched an open-source framework for spinning up AI behavior evaluations from text. The tool enables developers to automate testing and regression.

cards.title: Microsoft Scout brings OpenClaw to 365
cards.body: Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant bringing OpenClaw power to Microsoft 365. The personal assistant launched at Microsoft Build conference.

cards.title: Google detects AI deepfake calls with new tool
cards.body: Google rolled out fake call detection to combat AI deepfake impersonation scams. Scammers spoof trusted numbers using AI to mimic authority figures.

cards.title: Microsoft gives developers control of AI agents
cards.body: Microsoft offers developers portable policy files to define AI agent behavior. Teams can enforce compliance and security rules across deployments.

cards.title: OpenAI launches Codex plug-ins for white-collar work
cards.body: OpenAI released six Codex plug-ins targeting data analytics, sales, design, and finance roles. Each bundle integrations and context for specialized workflows.

cards.title: Anthropic expands Claude Mythos to critical infrastructure
cards.body: Anthropic expanded Project Glasswing security program to 150 organizations across 15 countries. Claude Mythos now protects critical infrastructure in power, water, healthcare.

cards.title: ZeroDrift raises $10M for AI compliance protection
cards.body: ZeroDrift secured $10M for AI compliance services that flag problematic messages. The tool sits between AI models and users to ensure safety.

cards.title: Trump signs narrower AI oversight executive order
cards.body: President Trump signed revised AI order requiring only voluntary prerelease government reviews. The narrower approach followed industry objections to stricter measures.

cards.title: Google Gemma 4 12B runs on 16GB laptops
cards.body: Google's new Gemma 4 12B model is designed for consumer laptops with 16GB RAM. The lightweight AI model enables local deployment.

cards.title: Microsoft, Atom, EeroQ advance quantum computing
cards.body: Microsoft, Atom Computing, and EeroQ updated progress on quantum systems. The collaboration demonstrates progress in quantum-AI convergence.

cards.title: Android phones detect spoofed calls and scams
cards.body: Android devices will soon detect spoofed calls and impersonation scams. Google's AI-powered detection helps protect users from fraud.

cards.title: Microsoft Project Solara builds Android for AI agents
cards.body: Microsoft's Project Solara is a new Android OS designed for AI agents instead of apps. The platform optimizes agent-centric workflows.

cards.title: Mathematicians warn of AI threats to profession
cards.body: Mathematicians issued warnings as AI industry encroaches on mathematical work. The profession faces disruption from advancing AI capabilities.

cards.title: Meta plays catch-up in AI competition
cards.body: Meta is intensifying efforts to compete in AI development. The company is investing heavily to close gaps with industry leaders.

cards.title: Small businesses leverage AI for administration
cards.body: AI enables small businesses to automate accounting, design, and market research. The technology helps handle diverse operational tasks efficiently.

cards.title: Agentic AI transforms global healthcare delivery
cards.body: AI agents help address healthcare sector strain from underinvestment and staffing gaps. The technology improves access and reduces fragmented care.

cards.title: Pope's encyclical emphasizes AI neutrality is false
cards.body: Pope Leo XIV's Magnifica Humanitas encyclical states 'technology is never neutral.' The document calls for courageous action on AI governance.
